questions.title: When you step out of the shower, what does your footprint look like?
questions.description: This helps us determine your baseline structural alignment.

options.label: The Whole Foot
options.description: I see my entire foot, including the arch area.

options.label: A Half-Moon
options.description: There's a moderate curve connecting heel to toe.

options.label: Just Heel & Toe
options.description: Very little connection visible between heel and toe.

questions.title: Where do you experience the most discomfort?
questions.description: We'll tailor the sensory nodes to target your specific pain points.

options.label: Heel / Plantar
options.description: Sharp pain especially in the mornings.

options.label: Midfoot / Arch
options.description: Aching along the inside of the foot.

options.label: Ball of Foot
options.description: Burning or aching near the toes.
